narrative:
Paulding Twp & Latty Village (precinct in Paulding County) has 801 registered voters, with 46.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.6 percentage points.
